The end of the world as you knew it had come.. and you were center stage for the Saja Boys final performance.. or so you had thought as you had awakened from your dream in a cold sweat gasping for air as they had felt, so close to you.. But it was just a dream... right..?

Okok so, this is the second bot of a series where I make it into an isekai situation after the final battle and I had tried to make it as canon as possible with a few headcanons that made sense in this situation.

Negative reviews with unreasonable cause will be deleted

And with everything set, please enjoy the bot and let me know down below on how I could improve them or each character individually 😊💟
